繼早前槍手名宿伊恩胡禮回擊奧斯爾應該盡早續約，以示對球隊效忠的言論後，在接受天空體育(Sky Sports)的訪問時提到禾確特是否應該離開時，他表示禾確特應該離開，為了他自己著想。他說：「我不知道他現在可以在阿仙奴可以走到幾遠，只係聯賽盃和歐霸盃比賽。」「 他想在他所做的事情上完成一個很高的成就，他在阿仙奴的時候已經給予非常好的效勞，所以他應該繼續前進。」

Asked on Sky Sports if Walcott should leave, Wright said: 'I think so, for [his own] sake.’

'I'm not sure where he can go now with Arsenal and he’s only playing in the Carabao Cup and the Europa League.’

'He'll want to finish on a high in respect of what he’s doing, he's given Arsenal great service in the time he’s been there and for me he should move on for himself.’

【now.com體育】剛被愛華頓解僱的朗奴高文說，盧卡古離隊、基奧特決定留效阿仙奴，加上愛華頓季初需應付連場硬場，早已令他知道自己的帥位不穩。

朗奴高文（Ronald Koeman）遭愛華頓辭退已是不爭事實，他接受訪問時表示，早於今夏已知自己帥位「危險」，原因之一竟關於現效力阿仙奴的前鋒基奧特（Olivier Giroud）：「基奧特已來到我們那處，他是（替代盧卡古的）完美人選，但他在最後關頭決定寧願住在倫敦和留效阿仙奴，那是難以接受的，你告訴我，哪裡還有更好的前鋒？突然之間，己隊就失去了這樣一位球員。」

未能買入基奧特替代盧卡古，固然是愛華頓今季積弱原因之一，但朗奴高文認為，「拖肥」的英超賽程令球隊未能交出好成績，導致其帥位不保：「我電郵收到英超賽程表時正在放假，我看過後發覺球會首9場比賽中，將有5場要面對上季前6球隊，車路士、熱刺、曼城、曼聯和阿仙奴。」

「我再次細閱，然後對自己嘆了一聲，這絕對不容易應付，尤其同時需要應付歐霸盃，以及歐霸盃外圍賽令我們提早開季。但最重要的是，我失去了前鋒盧卡古。」朗奴高文續說。

阿仙奴周四舉行周年股當大會，最大股東高安基（Stan Kroenke）會上表示，擁有兵工廠是長線投資，不會因為一時成績欠理想而輕易打退堂鼓，強調仍會繼續力撐今年5月才獲兵工廠續約兩年的主帥雲加（Arsene Wenger）。

高安基說：「己隊每年均設有目標，但就不會作公開討論。要目標達到，己隊並不只在關鍵的比賽出盡力便可。在深信其經驗、價值和質量，深信他在獲得適當支持下可帶領己隊步向成功後，雲加早前已獲續約兩年，己隊很想在最高水平競爭，勝出更多錦標，以及為球會創造更多歷史。」

早前，阿仙奴就阿歷斯山齊士和奧斯爾的續約問題糾纏了好一段時間，最終仍是決定不賣，高安基認為在出售尹佩斯一役獲得經驗後，才會決定如此決定：「外間的人對箇中情況和要求毫不了解，為了本季可以得到最佳勝出錦標機會，己隊作出了不賣山齊士和奧斯爾的決定，球會並不是將金錢放在首位。我們採取的態度，就是要令自己獲得最佳贏取錦標的機會。」

高安基說：「己隊每年均設有目標，但就不會作公開討論。要目標達到，己隊並不只在關鍵的比賽出盡力便可。在深信其經驗、價值和質量，深信他在獲得適當支持下可帶領己隊步向成功後，雲加早前已獲續約兩年，己隊很想在最高水平競爭，勝出更多錦標，以及為球會創造更多歷史。」

早前，阿仙奴就阿歷斯山齊士和奧斯爾的續約問題糾纏了好一段時間，最終仍是決定不賣，高安基認為在出售尹佩斯一役獲得經驗後，才會決定如此決定：「外間的人對箇中情況和要求毫不了解，為了本季可以得到最佳勝出錦標機會，己隊作出了不賣山齊士和奧斯爾的決定，球會並不是將金錢放在首位。我們採取的態度，就是要令自己獲得最佳贏取錦標的機會。」

［red]On the Ozil, Lacazette and Sanchez partnership[/red]

They can create chances and score goals. But as well up front depends a lot on the quality of the build up from the back.

At home the speed of our passing will be absolutely important to create chances.

On the anger at the end of the AGM for chairman Sir Chips Keswick

You want everybody to support the club. It’s difficult for me to come out on that.

I think all of us have the same target and that’s to make Arsenal successful. That’s what I have to say.


On Sir Chips being dismissive at the end to shareholders

It was not meant to be dismissive at all. The chairman represents the board and answers a question. That’s a rule that is set before the meeting starts.

Was that the right way to represent the club?

I am concerned about the pre-match press conference for Swansea, not so much to assess the quality of the AGM.

On the wealth in football making it more difficult for him to succeed, despite his hunger for success

Yes, it makes it more difficult. That’s not only in football - it’s in society. It’s a concern for everybody.

Today the four biggest companies dominate the world economy. It is a concentration of the strength of the financial power in football and general society.

On whether Eddie Nketiah will continue to get a chance this season

He will continue to get a chance.

When you look at results at youth level, the Under-17s again with England - it’s the first time since I’ve been in England that you have consistent level of results in the youth teams.

That means the quality is there. The next step is to integrate them into the Premier League.

As managers today, our position has become weaker than 20 years ago. To integrate young players you have to be strong. That is a problem England will need to sort out in the coming years.

To give a chance to these younger players. Honestly, I believe that is the final step of a young players’ development but also the most difficult.

Will Nketiah play a role in the first team this season

Of course, if he continues to develop. You can’ think that because has cored two goals that he straight away is ready to play in the Premier League.

If he scores two goals there is quality there that you have to take care of.

On Theo Walcott’s future

I do not want Theo to move on. His time in the Premier League will come.

These guys, when you look at the number of minutes they’ve played since the start of the season, it’s quite a big number. But I’ve gone into a rotation policy because we play Thursday, Sunday most of the time.

At the moment he has got less minutes in the Premier League than in other competitions.

On whether the Everton performance is what Arsenal must achieve every week

We have no room for missing games anymore because we had some bad results away from home.

We are always capable of winning a way but we need as well to keep pur impeccable home record.

We know from the Everton game we can win away and that’s important

On Ozil and Sanchez

What people questioned is their commitment to the team and the club.

I didn’t. What happened on Sunday reinforced my belief even more.

What I want from them is to sow that week in, week out.

Should there be some sort of quota to help with youth getting a chance

I’m against a quota because I’ve seen it many times and it never worked.

People get around it. I remember in some counties they were forced to start with three Under-21 players and after five minutes they took them off straight away. It’s ridiculous.

I believe you have to earn your right to play and managers have to be strong enough to play them when they deserve to play.

We’re you shocked by the level of dissent at the AGM?

I have nothing to add, I want more to focus on Saturday’s game.

Is Ozil back to his best?

He’s in very good shape. He’s focused, motivated so I would say yes.

He had a knee problem. It was not a massive problem but you never know how much it harms the player.

On whether there will be a review at the end of the season about his position

I’m 21 years at the club. I want to feel that I do well and see what the board thinks of my performance. After that we see.

My desire has always been to respect my contracts.

Is the Lacazette, Ozil and Sanchez partnership the way forward for the Premier League team

They were efficient at Everton, they have to be efficient again on Saturday.

There is no definite solution. They are in a job where competition counts. They have to make it work to keep their position.

阿仙奴領隊雲格強調，英格蘭前鋒禾確特在球隊陣中仍有前途，又謂他將會在英超得到上陣機會。

現年28歲的禾確特在兵工廠陣中逐漸被邊緣化，他今季在英超僅以後備姿態上陣三場，合共踢了48分鐘。阿仙奴名宿伊恩胡禮指他應該離隊尋求更多上陣機會，但雲格卻開口留人，表示禾確特將會得到更多上陣機會。該名法國籍領隊說：「我不希望禾確特離開，他在英超的時間將會來臨，我目前使用了輪換制度，因為球隊有太多比賽了，如今他在英超的上陣時間只是比其他賽事稍為少了一點而已。」

加泰獨立：準備就緒

據西班牙TVE報道，加泰執政黨「一起說是」(Junts pel Sí)及極左獨派「人民團結候選人」(La CUP)今天已在議會登記方案，「建立加泰共和國，獨立及擁有完整主權、法律、民主及社群」。

自治區主席Carles Puigdemont因應西班牙參議院的155條憲法措施，將決定權轉移至加泰議會。方案一旦於議會通過，他們將迎來首次主權挑戰：當西班牙參議院通過制裁，加泰會同步執行獨立建國程序。
